card.name: High Fencing
card.text: When High Fencing enters, create a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1" and equip {2}) Equipment you control are copies of the creature they're attached to, except they're Equipment artifacts with equip {2}.

card.name: Subway Maintenance Tech
card.text: Activated abilities of Subway Maintenance Tech cost {2} less to activate. This can't reduce the mana in that cost to less than one mana. (In any zone.) Scavenge {X}{R}{R}, exile nine minus X other cards from your graveyard. ({X}{R}{R}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a number of +1/+1 counters equal to this card's power on target creature. Scavenge only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Vision Pirate
card.text: When Vision Pirate enters, conjure a duplicate of target nontoken permanent you control into your graveyard. The duplicate gains unearth {3}. ({3}: Return that card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Exile it at the beginning of the end step or if it would leave the battlefield. Unearth only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Plotkeeper
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, target creature you control and permanents with the same name as it gain "{3}{U}: Create a token that's a copy of this permanent, then you may return it to its owner's hand." until end of turn.

card.name: Madsel, Runaway Princess
card.text: When Madsel, Runaway Princess enters, create X Weapon tokens. (They're Equipment with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1" and equip {2}) Whenever Madsel, Runaway Princess attacks, for each Equipment attached to it, conjure a duplicate of target nontoken permanent into its owner's graveyard.

card.name: Idlewild Puppet Theater
card.text: Create a dynamized 1/1 white Toy creature token. (A dynamized permanent may activate each of its nonloyalty abilities for free once each turn.). Exile Idlewild Puppet Theater. When you do, creatures you control gain "{3}{W}: You may cast a copy of Idlewild Puppet Theater. Activate only once."

card.name: Ingke, Relucant Thief
card.text: When Ingke, Relucant Thief enters, conjure a card named Bridge From Below into your hand. Creatures you control have "{T}: The next time a card would be put into an opponent's graveyard this turn, exile it instead."

card.name: Pale
card.text: Destroy target creature. Its controller creates a token that's a copy of if, except it's a 1/1 Insect with "At the beginning of your end step, sacrifice this creature."

card.name: Doll Enthusiast
card.text: Doll Enthusiast enters tapped. When it does, create a dynamized 1/1 white Toy creature token. (A dynamized permanent may activate each of its nonloyalty abilities for free once each turn.). {1}: If Doll Enthusiast is in your graveyard, target creature you control gains "{2}: Return target card named Doll Enthusiast from your graveyard o the battlefield." until end of turn.

card.name: Display Model
card.text: Target creature gets +3/+3 and loses its printed activated abilities until end of turn. Dynamize it until end of turn. (A dynamized permanent may activate each of its nonloyalty abilities for free once each turn.).

card.name: Negatiive Capability
card.text: {2}{G}: If Negatiive Capability isn't dynamized, put two +1/+1 counters on it and dynamize it. (A dynamized permanent may activate each of its nonloyalty abilities for free once each turn.).

card.name: Lose It
card.text: Target creature gains "{2}: This creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn". until end of turn. It fights target creature you don't control.

card.name: Bearer Of Visions
card.text: Each card in a graveyard is a copy of Bearer Of Visions. Scavenge {5} ({5}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a number of +1/+1 counters equal to this card's power on target creature. Scavenge only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Fatuous Clockworks
card.text: Fatuous Clockworks enters tapped. When it does, conjure a duplicate of it into your graveyard. {T}: Add {U}. {5}, Exile Fatuous Clockworks from your graveyard: Draw a card.

card.name: Astrologaster
card.text: Each other creature or creature card you own in any zone has another instance of its abilities.

card.name: Thunderous Clockworks
card.text: Thunderous Clockworks enters tapped. When it does, conjure a duplicate of it into your graveyard. {T}: Add {R}. {5}, Exile Thunderous Clockworks from your graveyard: Draw a card.

card.name: Obsequious Clockworks
card.text: Obsequious Clockworks enters tapped. When it does, conjure a duplicate of it into your graveyard. {T}: Add {W}. {5}, Exile Obsequious Clockworks from your graveyard: Draw a card.

card.name: Portentious Clockworks
card.text: Portentious Clockworks enters tapped. When it does, conjure a duplicate of it into your graveyard. {T}: Add {B}. {5}, Exile Portentious Clockworks from your graveyard: Draw a card.

card.name: Melifluous Clockworks
card.text: Melifluous Clockworks enters tapped. When it does, conjure a duplicate of it into your graveyard. {T}: Add {G}. {5}, Exile Melifluous Clockworks from your graveyard: Draw a card.

card.name: Fall Out Of Time
card.text: Fall Out Of Time deals 3 damage to any target. When you cast this spell, target creature you control gains "{3}: Copy target spell named Fall Out Of Time." (You must choose the same target.")

card.name: Oslana, Robotic Battle Maid
card.text: You may have other artifacts you control enter as copies of Oslana. If Oslana would gain an activated or triggered ability, instead each creature you control named Oslana, Robotic Battle Maid gains that ability. {3}{W}: Dynamize Oslana. (A dynamized permanent may activate each of its nonloyalty abilities for free once each turn.).

card.name: Courtly Mercenary
card.text: Courtly Mercenary enters tapped. When it does, create a tapped Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.") Courtly Mercenary has all activated abilities of artifacts you control, except they cost "Sacrifice this artifact" less to activate.

card.name: The Heart Of Fairytale
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, put a loyalty counter on each permanent you control with a loyalty ability. {2}, {T}: Each nonland permanent you control gains an additional instance of each nonloyalty activated ability it has, except it's a loyalty ability that costs [-3].

card.name: Cold Feet
card.text: Exile target creature until its controller's next end step. When it enters, exile it until its controller's next end step.

card.name: Counsel From Nowhere
card.text: Flying {1}: Counsel From Nowhere becomes a copy of another card in your graveyard. (Until it leaves your graveyard.)

card.name: Veteran Ghoulcaller
card.text: Menace Whenever a card in your graveyard is put into your hand, conjure a duplicate of that card into your hand.

card.name: Borlian Worthy
card.text: Prowess When Borlian Worthy's power is 3 or greater, dynamize it. (A dynamized permanent may activate each of its nonloyalty abilities for free once each turn.).

card.name: Parasitic Vulture
card.text: Flying Whenever one or more cards are put into your graveyard from your hand or library, return one of them to your hand and conjure a duplicate of it into your graveyard.

card.name: Flash Of Steel
card.text: Choose one. If you cast this spell, target opponent copies it and chooses each mode not chosen— • Destroy up to one target creature. • Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand. Entwine {3}

card.name: Keeper Of The Rosary
card.text: Flash When Keeper Of The Rosary enters, choose a card name. Activated abilities of sources with the chosen name and of sources without a legal card name can't be activated.

card.name: Script Change
card.text: Counter target spell. Create a dynamized 1/1 white Toy creature token. (A dynamized permanent may activate each of its nonloyalty abilities for free once each turn.)

card.name: Sinister Reflections
card.text: Conjure a duplicate of each of up to two target nontoken creatures you control into your hand.

card.name: Ceremonial Second
card.text: When Ceremonial Second enters, up to one target creature becomes an Equipment artifact with equip {2}. (Indefinitely) If s triggered ability of an equipment attached to Ceremonial Second would trigger, it triggers an additional time.

card.name: Nupital Page
card.text: Whenever Nupital Page attacks, creatures you control gain "{R}: This creature gains +1/+0 until end of turn."

card.name: Abscond
card.text: Exile target creature. Its controller conjures two basic land cards of their choice into their hand.

card.name: Vendor Of Roses
card.text: Creatures and artifacts you control have "{T}, Tap an untapped creature you control named Vendor of Roses: Create a Treasure token." Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, untap Vendor Of Roses.

card.name: Rabbitkeeper
card.text: When Rabbitkeeper enters, create a dynamized 1/1 white Toy creature token. (A dynamized permanent may activate each of its nonloyalty abilities for free once each turn.). Each other creature or creature card you own in any zone has every name.

card.name: Orb-Bearer
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create a 1/1 blue Orb creature token with "{3}: This creature's base power and toughness become 3/3" {4}{U}: Dynamize each Orb token you control.

card.name: Curtsy
card.text: Return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. Draw a card.

card.name: Introduce the Principals
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Conjure two duplicates of the discarded card into your hand.

card.name: Magisanct Peregrine
card.text: When Magisanct Peregrine enters, exile target artifact or enchantment until Magisanct Peregrine leaves the battlefield. Unearth {W} ({W}: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the end step or if it would leave the battlefield. Unearth only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Castle Krimnacht
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color. {4}, {T}: Dynamize Castle Krimnacht, (A dynamized permanent may activate each of its nonloyalty abilities for free once each turn.).

card.name: Castle Librarian
card.text: When Castle Librarian enters, create a Clue token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.) {4}{U}: Dynamize each artifact you control without a legal name. (A dynamized permanent may activate each of its nonloyalty abilities for free once each turn.).

card.name: The Show Must Go On
card.text: Take an extra turn after tbs one. During that turn, activated abilities you activate cost {2} less to activate. This can't reduce the mana in that cost to less than one mana.

card.name: Magisanct Binding
card.text: When Magisanct Binding enters, exile target creature until Magisanct Binding leaves the battlefield. {1}{W}: Exile target permanent you control until Magisanct Binding leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Scrapwork Mutt
card.text: When this creature enters, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card. Unearth {1}{R}} ({1}{R}: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the end step or if it would leave the battlefield. Unearth only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Moon's Request
card.text: Moon's Request deals 3 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. Exile Moon's Request and six other cards from your graveyard: Draw a card.

card.name: Darling Rider
card.text: When Darling Rider enters, create a dynamized 1/1 white Toy creature token. (A dynamized permanent may activate each of its nonloyalty abilities for free once each turn.) Creatures you control have "{T}: Target creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery."

card.name: Yen
card.text: Exile the top two cards of your library, then conjure a duplicate of one of them into your graveyard. Until end of turn, you may play those cards.

card.name: Regal Mourner
card.text: Whenever Regal Mourner attacks, return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It becomes a 1/1 Bird with flying and loses all abilities.

card.name: Celestial Lowly
card.text: Flying, vigilance {T}: Copy target activated ability. You may choose new targets for the copy. (Mana abilities can't be targeted.)

card.name: Magisanct Reliquary
card.text: Create a token that's a copy of target creature, except it's an Equipment with equip {2} and "This artifact has no other nonequip abilities unless it's attached to a creature."

card.name: Hilda, Magisanct Surperior
card.text: Once each turn, whenever you activate a nonmana ability, you may create an artifact token with that ability, except it has "Whenever you activate an ability of this artifact for the third time each turn, it becomes a 3/2 Angel creature with flying."

card.name: Arbitration Court Angel
card.text: Flying Whenever you exile Arbitration Court Angel or another nontoken creature you control, conjure a duplicate of it into your graveyard. Unearth {5}{W} ({5}{W}: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the end step or if it would leave the battlefield. Unearth only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Gossip
card.text: Draw a card. {3}{U}, Exile Gossip from your graveyard: Conjure a card named Gossip into your hand.

card.name: Resolve
card.text: Target creature you control gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn. Create two dynamized Weapon tokens attached to it. (They're Equipment with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1" and equip {2}. A dynamized permanent may activate each of its nonloyalty abilities for free once each turn)

card.name: Magisanct Anchoresss
card.text: When Magisanct Anchoresss enters create a tapped artifact token named Relic. Artifacts you control have "{T}, Pay 2 life: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control named Magisanct Anchoresss."

card.name: Plush Gallery
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature loses all abilities and is a dynamized 1/1 Toy.

card.name: Fan The Collection
card.text: Fan The Collection deals X damage to any nonplayer target. Create X dynamized Weapon tokens. (They're Equipment with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1" and equip {2}. A dynamized permanent may activate each of its nonloyalty abilities for free once each turn)

card.name: Overstimulate
card.text: Destroy target artifact. If it was a token, copy this spell and you may choose new targets for the copy. {2}{R}, Discard Overstimulate and another card: Draw two cards.

card.name: Armature Wright
card.text: Whenever Armature Wright attacks, conjure a duplicate of it into your graveyard. Scavenge {3}{G}{G} ({3}{G}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a number of +1/+1 counters equal to this card's power on target creature. Scavenge only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Brutish Foreigner
card.text: Whenever you activate an ability of Brutish Foreigner, it deals 2 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Paradise Mantle
card.text: Equipped creature has "{T}: Add one mana of any color." Equip {0}

card.name: Dreaded Future
card.text: Target opponent reveals their hand and the top card of their library. Exile two nonland cards from among them, then that player draws a card.

card.name: Raucous Wedding Band
card.text: Whenever Raucous Wedding Band attacks, target creature you control gains "{3}{G}: Create a token that's a copy of this creature, except it's a 3/2 Human Bard named Raucous Wedding Band. Activate only once". That token gains this ability.

card.name: Fencing Maester
card.text: Vigilance Whenever Fencing Maester enters or attacks, create a Weapon token attached to target creature you control. It gains all activated abilities of that creature.

card.name: Hermit Artist
card.text: Whenever you activate an ability of a creature, put a +1/+1 counter on it. {3}{G}: Draw a card for each +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. Activate only once.

card.name: Breach of Decorum
card.text: Each creature you control gains trample, vigilance, and "{T}: This creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn" until end of turn.

card.name: Null Witch
card.text: Activated abilities of creatures can't be activated.

card.name: Perfect Little Universe
card.text: Whenever you activate an ability, if it isn't a mana ability, copy it twice. You may choose new targets for the copies.

card.name: Lines Of Descent
card.text: Conjure duplicates of up to two target creatures you control and/or creature cards in your graveyard.into your graveyard. Those duplicates gain scavenge {4} ({4}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a number of +1/+1 counters equal to this card's power on target creature. Scavenge only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Mirrorbinder
card.text: Mirrorbinder has all activated abilities of creature cards in your graveyard, except they cost "Exile this card from your graveyard" less to activate.

card.name: Production Kit
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {C}{C}. Spend this mana only to activate abilities.

card.name: Anatomical Student
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice a creature or artifact, that permanent gains unearth {1}{B}. (In your graveyard. {1}{B}: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Exile it at the beginning of the end step or if it would leave the battlefield. Unearth only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Court Pharmacist
card.text: Whenever Court Pharmacist or another nontoken creature you control enters, if it wasn't cast or if no mana was spent to cast it, put two +1/+1 scouters on it.

card.name: Garish Bauble
card.text: Garish Bauble is dynamized. (A dynamized permanent may activate each of its nonloyalty abilities for free once each turn.). When Garish Bauble enters, draw a card.

card.name: Sentimental Violinist
card.text: Sentimental Violinist can't block. Whenever Sentimental Violinist attacks, exile the top card of your library. Target creature or artifact gains "{2}{R}: You may play the exiled card this turn." until end of turn.

card.name: Intrusive Thought
card.text: Trample When Intrusive Thought enters, return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand. Whenever one or more cards leave our graveyard, conjure a duplicate of one of them into exile. You may play it this turn.

card.name: Tear In The Curtain
card.text: Trample When Tear In The Curtain enters, target creature gains "{3}: Conjure a card named Tear In The Curtain into your hand" until end of turn.

card.name: Prop Failure
card.text: Exile target artifact or enchantment and up to two cards from its owner's graveyard. Discard this card: Target creature gains "{3}, {T}: Draw a card" until end of turn."

card.name: Toy NMQ
card.text: (A dynamized permanent may activate each of its nonloyalty abilities for free once each turn.).

card.name: Weapon NMQ
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+1 Equip {2}

card.name: Copy NMQ
card.text: (Use this token to represent a copy of a permanent.)
